value.found_quote: codex app: Launch the Codex desktop app on macOS or Windows. On macOS, Codex can open a workspace path; on Windows, Codex prints the path to open. ... codex: Launch the terminal UI. ... codex cloud: Browse or execute Codex Cloud tasks from the terminal without opening the TUI.
value.rationale: The page describes multiple access surfaces for Codex: a terminal UI (via `codex` command), a desktop app for macOS/Windows (via `codex app`), cloud tasks (via `codex cloud`), remote WebSocket/Unix socket connections (via `--remote`), and an app-server (via `codex app-server`). This substantiates access surfaces including terminal, desktop/web-like app, and cloud. While the page doesn't explicitly enumerate "terminal, IDE, web, cloud, mobile" as a named feature list, it clearly describes the agent being usable across multiple surfaces including terminal, desktop app (macOS/Windows), and cloud environments.
